programme.title: In Old Sante Fe
programme.desc: Kentucky loses his horse in a rigged horse race and gets framed for the murder of a stagecoach driver

programme.title: Abilene Town

programme.title: Arena
programme.desc: In a huge space arena fighters from all over the galaxy come to battle each other in hopes of claiming victory While most warriors are of various alien species Steve Armstrong Paul Satterfield is a rarity -- a human who aspires to compete in the games Training with his friend Shorty Hamilton Camp and encouraged by the lovely promoter Quinn Claudia Christian Steve has a shot at the intergalactic championship but plenty of extraterrestrial brawlers are eager to take him down

programme.title: Robot Jox
programme.desc: Huge robots manned by jockeys Gary Graham Anne-Marie Johnson Paul Koslo fight superpower duels in the post-World War III future

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A military test is conducted in the remote desert and headquartered in the resort where Kimble is working He learns of the top-secret operation and this knowledge puts him in great danger

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike and his partner fight the bends as they endure a long recovery process in a submarines escape trunk

programme.title: Sea Hunt
programme.desc: Mike and his diving team are attacked by a violent new breed of octopus

programme.title: 12 OClock High
programme.desc: Gen Savage becomes a POW in a Nazi camp after being shot down and the commander there wants to use him to break the other prisoners will to escape

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Dark Shadows

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Dark Shadows

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Dark Shadows

programme.title: Dark Shadows
programme.desc: Dark Shadows

programme.title: The Oklahoma Cyclone
programme.desc: A search for his missing father prompts a cowboy to infiltrate a gang of desperadoes

programme.title: The Hanging Tree
programme.desc: Joseph a doctor keeps dominating peoples lives He frees a robber Rune from getting hanged; and forces his charge on him too as compensation Things change when Elizabeth enters Josephs life

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Freddy harasses a young medical student on Halloween night driving her to the brink of madness and beyond

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Lies not been easy for actress Helen Shes getting older and her dreams of hitting the big time are disappearing When she gets a chance to take part in a beauty contest shes determined to do ANYTHING to win

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: Married couple Fred and Ermas restaurant has seen better days But things change once a stranger walks in with a rather unique steak recipe

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Down on his luck yuppie Richard Shepard crashes at his buddy Carls swanky seaside abode after he gets thrown out of his home by his fed-up wife Eleanor Richard develops a strong bond with a mysterious large white dog who not only becomes his new best friend but also kills anyone who angers Richard

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Struggling writer Jeffrey Hunt fakes his own death in order to achieve literary immortality His unfaithful wife Debby has been having an adulterous affair with Jeffreys publicist and best friend Tony Lynch Debby and Tony try to make Jeffreys staged death real but the plan backfires

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric is stranded by a thunderstorm in an isolated log lodge with six other people who are being killed off one by one

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick secretly investigates a member of Internal Affairs as he searches for the reason behind a fellow officers suicide

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A model uses a cursed compact to dispose of anyone who stands in the way of her success including her doctor and her lover

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: The castaways find a headhunter tribes totem pole on the island The head on the top of it bears an uncanny resemblance to Gilligan--which comes in handy when the headhunters return to the island

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: After Mary Ann watches Ginger perform on the island she hits her head giving her amnesia thus believing that she is Ginger Grant Everyone plays along until Mary Ann cant act or dance and her memory comes back

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E22
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E22

programme.title: Real McCoys S02E06
programme.desc: Real McCoys S02E06

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: A British scientist is hiding at Maxs apartment

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Maxs archenemy Siegfried wants to defect

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: When High Ball Trucking corners the regional supply on diesel and tries to squeeze out the independent carriers BJ taps an alternative fuel source guaranteed to keep him ahead of Hammer and a pesky revenuer

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Carol has sprained her wrist so Wilbur hires Velma a fantastic cook She even serves carrot pizzas to Ed When Velma announces that shes leaving to find a boyfriend Ed calls her on the phone and pretends to be a local secret admirer

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur hires a bumbling handyman to fix up the house in anticipation of a visit from Home Beautiful Magazine and Ed wants new shoes

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: In order to steal enough explosives to blow up a difficult bridge Hogans men paint anti-Nazi graffiti on the camps ammo building

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan wants to get a peek at the documents that a visiting general has

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Binghamton is offered a promotion and transfer up to Fleet HQ but must first reconcile a shortage in the bases equipment inventory After all is accounted for except for one item - A barrage balloon - McHale and The Crew must race against time in order to locate it and bring it in in time for Binghamton to be shipped out

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: A business venture - Involving the manufacture and sale of sarongs to the Base personnel - Has the guys divided into two separate quarreling groups When the feud escalates Binghamton tries to take advantage of its effect on them during a PT Crew efficiency test - Their failure of which would mean their being shipped out for re-assignment

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter wants his men to pass a promotion test

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Klink reluctantly falls in with two other Kommandants plotting against Burkhalter Burkhalter finds out Now Hogan must step in before Stalag 13 loses Klink the military way - by firing squad

programme.title: KILL ROMMEL
programme.desc: During WWII US Lieutenant Morris and British captain Hull are assigned in a mission to kill Rommel

programme.title: The Black Tent
programme.desc: In the African desert a British soldier romances the native chiefs daughter and helps the tribe fight off a Nazi attack

programme.title: Reach For the Sky
programme.desc: Biopic of RAF Group Captain Douglas Bader who after having lost both legs flew a British fighter plane during WWII

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Henry Flatt a man the Dukes know whom is believed to be dead shows up alive He faked his death because he took some money from Boss Hogg and to avoid his wrath which included a burial at the local cemetery He learned that because no one has been buried at the cemetery for some time Boss can get the land to use for one of his projects and when he digs up his grave Boss will know he is not dead So he sets out to put another body in his grave so he gets an unclaimed body And the Dukes try to help him before things get out of hand

programme.title: Hercules 111
programme.desc: Hercules 111

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: The relic left by Mael is stolen from the mother ship Zoor threatens to destroy a major city if it isnt returned Liam believes the final chapters contain information on synthesizing core energy

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: Suzanne learns that a friend of hers has disappeared from his college campus Meanwhile the aliens are on campus in search of a bio-weapon

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane resurrects his wife Tatania only to learn the woman hes kept frozen all these years is Kitty Lane an exotic dancer and impostor placed in Arcanes lab by General Sunderland Sunderland has been holding the real Tatania captive

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcane uploads the memory of his former teacher directly into his own In an ironic twist of justice Carl Mirador was schizophrenic and is now driving Arcane insane

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: A wandering energy force inhabits the body of Alpha technician Anton Zoref turning him into an energy absorbing being

programme.title: Night of the Comet
programme.desc: A comet wipes out most of life on Earth leaving two Valley Girls fighting against cannibal zombies and a sinister group of scientists

programme.title: Young Riders
programme.desc: Young Riders

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Angered by the rising cost of health care an old man tries to pay his friends bills by threatening a businessman with the bombing of his buildings

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Rogosh is an operative for a country hostile to the United States When he strikes he typically leaves dozens if not hundreds of bodies in his wake Rogosh has been spotted in Los Angeles But he will not crack under normal interrogation methods Briggs comes up with an unusual plan The IMF stages an accident where pedestrian Rogosh is struck by a car When he awakes he appears to be in a prison in his home country -- three years later

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Dragnet

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: A woman hires Kimble to be the caretaker of her brother who was disabled in a car accident Her boyfriend wants her to run away with him along with her brothers insurance money Kimble becomes the unwitting patsy in his scheme

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: While in Mexico tending to a Barkley mine Heath aids a Mexican General an old family friend who escapes the wrath of an oppressive leader When it is found out that the General is living in California at the Barkley Ranch Heath is jailed - and his life is used to bargain for the Generals return

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Looking for a job Cheyenne rides into town and is caught up in a fight and witnesses a bank holdup Deputized he catches the robber but is conflicted when the fugitive saves him from a bear trap that almost kills him

programme.title: Arena
programme.desc: In a huge space arena fighters from all over the galaxy come to battle each other in hopes of claiming victory While most warriors are of various alien species Steve Armstrong Paul Satterfield is a rarity -- a human who aspires to compete in the games Training with his friend Shorty Hamilton Camp and encouraged by the lovely promoter Quinn Claudia Christian Steve has a shot at the intergalactic championship but plenty of extraterrestrial brawlers are eager to take him down

programme.title: Battle Beyond The Stars
programme.desc: Shad of Akir Richard Thomas recruits a space cowboy George Peppard and other warriors to defend his planet from a barbarians army

programme.title: King Kong Vs Godzilla
programme.desc: Godzilla a prehistoric monster emerges from hibernation while a pharmaceutical company seeks publicity by bringing in another monster When the two battle it out death and destruction follow

programme.title: Satans Triangle
programme.desc: A mysterious woman is the sole survivor of a boat wreck caused by a sudden terrible storm off the coast of Florida

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance
programme.desc: Something or someone haunts a couples Robert Stack Vera Miles new home in the country

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk Returns
programme.desc: Hopefully on the verge of curing his Hulk condition Banner meets his colleague Don Blake who is mystically linked to a Viking warrior Thor

programme.title: No Retreat No Surrender
programme.desc: After his father is abused by some thugs a teenager considers Bruce Lees spirit as his teacher Later he trains to become a martial arts professional to avenge his fathers humiliation

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: Freddy harasses a young medical student on Halloween night driving her to the brink of madness and beyond

programme.desc: Construction workers Clint Walker Carl Betz Neville Brand battle an unmanned bulldozer energized by an alien force

programme.title: Night of the Zombies
programme.desc: Investigators search for soldiers missing bodies and hear unbelievable rumors about zombies Dismissing those rumors they set out to investigate After two men are found dead CIA special-agent Nick Monroe is sent to flush out what are suspected to be deserters from the old US Army Chemical Corps unit Nicks ruthless investigation uncovers a ghoulish plot of world domination but first he must escape the horror that does not want to be known yet!

programme.title: The Slumber Party Massacre
programme.desc: With her parents out of town high school senior Trish decides to throw a slumber party but things go downhill when an escaped killer wielding a power drill is loose in the neighbourhood

programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Nightbreed
programme.desc: A troubled young man is drawn to a mythical place called Midian where a variety of friendly monsters are hiding from humanity Meanwhile a sadistic serial killer is looking for a patsy

programme.title: The Return
programme.desc: In New Mexico an alien spacecraft abducts two young children and an old man 25 years later the children are returned as adults to the same town now beset by strange cattle mutilations

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from New York City, NY on Sept. 27, 2018, Karate Combat: One World is the third event of the Karate Combat fighting league's inaugural season. Heldatop the Freedom Tower on the 102nd Floor Observation Deck of One World Trade Center building. On the Main Card: Abdalla Ibrahim of the US/Egypt vs.Dionicio Gustavo of Dominican Republic. The co-main event features Brazil’s Luis Rocha and Dimitris Triantafyllis of Greece. A stacked card of 9 fights also featuresElhadji Ndour, Josh Quayhagen, and newcomers Adilet Shadykanov and Edgars Skrivers.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 23 filmed at the Subway Soccer Center in Calgary. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle in the cage. Cody Clarke vs. Matthew Norman; Phil Towler vs. Ryan Shanahan; Jesse Arnett vs. Mike O'Neill; Daymon Miller vs. Beau Bentley.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Antonin Marconi v. Rachid Magmadi

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The School of Hard Knocks 24 filmed at the Spectra Place in Estevan. Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in the cage. Tyson Haines vs. Cody Puls; Felix "The Cat" Jimenez vs. Steven Arens; Curtis Richard vs. Madison Mejia; Adam Zarrillo vs. Derek Lapierre.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Chris Smith v. Gareth Millar

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: The Premier MMA promotion, Telecast live across the globe Showcasing some of the worlds best MMA athletes.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Live from Hollywood, CA on January 24, 2019, Karate Combat: Hollywood kicks off Karate Combat's sophomore season. Held at the Avalon, the former Hollywood Palace building, near the famous intersection of Hollywood and Vine. Milos Vukovic v. Igor De Castaneda.

programme.desc: Tye Palmer v. Scott Rogan

programme.desc: The pupils seek out and find Merlin and hell teach the pupil Presto magic if he stays with Merlin Presto decides to stay and attempts a spell to create a way home but the spell summons dragons instead which attack a nearby village

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
